preamble: The spontaneous diphthongization of open 'o' in stressed syllables is another major feature of Romance vowel development, similar to the shift from 'e' to 'ie'.

examples.note: Latin open 'o' diphthongizes in stressed syllables in Spanish.
Latin open 'o' diphthongizes in stressed syllables in Spanish.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Languages: A Historical Introduction. Cambridge University Press.
